message:
feat(persist,sort,encoding): AOF rewrite pipeline, SORT conformance suite, intset encoding

Implement full AOF rewrite and persistence pipeline:
- Store::to_aof_commands() for deterministic keyspace serialization (all data types + TTL)
- argv_to_aof_records(), write_aof_file(), read_aof_file() in fr-persist
- Runtime::load_aof() replay and set_aof_path() configuration
- Wire SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF to actual AOF persistence

Add core_sort conformance suite (51 test cases) covering:
- Numeric and alpha sort, ASC/DESC, LIMIT
- BY external key, GET pattern, hash dereference (->)
- Multiple GET patterns, GET #, STORE, SORT_RO
- SORT_RO now correctly rejects STORE option

Fix OBJECT ENCODING for sets to detect intset encoding for all-integer sets.
Update FEATURE_PARITY.md (1375 conformance cases across 23 suites).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,13 +15,13 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 
 | Feature Family | Status | Notes |
 |---|---|---|
-| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 227 commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LOAD/LIST/STATS/DUMP/RESTORE/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), FCALL/FCALL_RO, Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE with full type coverage, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), Lua scripting (EVAL/EVALSHA/EVAL_RO/EVALSHA_RO with full Lua 5.1 evaluator including variables, arithmetic, string concat, comparisons, logical ops, if/elseif/else, for/while/repeat loops, tables, function calls/definitions, redis.call/pcall, KEYS/ARGV, standard library), SCRIPT LOAD/EXISTS/FLUSH; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES, ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH options, LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN, BITOP operation validation fix, ZRANGE REV rank-mode fix (now uses descending index like Redis); missing: full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
+| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 227 commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LOAD/LIST/STATS/DUMP/RESTORE/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), FCALL/FCALL_RO, Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE with full type coverage, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), Lua scripting (EVAL/EVALSHA/EVAL_RO/EVALSHA_RO with full Lua 5.1 evaluator including variables, arithmetic, string concat, comparisons, logical ops, if/elseif/else, for/while/repeat loops, tables, function calls/definitions, redis.call/pcall, KEYS/ARGV, standard library), SCRIPT LOAD/EXISTS/FLUSH; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES, ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH options, LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN, BITOP operation validation fix, ZRANGE REV rank-mode fix (now uses descending index like Redis), SORT_RO STORE rejection fix, OBJECT ENCODING intset detection for all-integer sets; missing: full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
 | Core data types and keyspace | in_progress | String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, HyperLogLog, and Geo data types implemented with full WRONGTYPE enforcement; Streams fully implemented (`XADD`, `XLEN`, `XDEL`, `XTRIM`, `XREAD`, `XREADGROUP`, `XCLAIM`, `XAUTOCLAIM`, `XPENDING`, `XACK`, `XSETID`, `XINFO STREAM/GROUPS/CONSUMERS`, `XGROUP CREATE/DESTROY/SETID/CREATECONSUMER/DELCONSUMER`, `XRANGE`, `XREVRANGE`) |
 | TTL and eviction behavior | in_progress | lazy expiry and `PTTL` semantics scaffolded (`-2/-1/remaining`) |
-| RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract scaffolded; full replay fidelity pending |
+| RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract implemented; Store→AOF rewrite serialization (all data types + TTL), atomic file I/O (write_aof_file/read_aof_file), Runtime::load_aof replay, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF wired to actual persistence; RDB snapshot format pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime; full parameter surface pending |
-| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (1324 core conformance cases) |
+| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `core_sort`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (1375 core conformance cases) |
 | Benchmark + optimization artifacts | in_progress | round1 + round2 baseline JSON, syscall profile, and expanded golden checksum artifacts added |
 | Full command/API surface closure | not_started | program-level closure row; all deferred families must roll up here before release sign-off |

@@ -0,0 +1,503 @@
+{
+  "suite": "core_sort",
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "setup_list_numeric",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["RPUSH", "nums", "3", "1", "4", "1", "5", "9", "2", "6"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 8 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_numeric_asc_default",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_numeric_desc",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "DESC"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_numeric_asc_explicit",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "ASC"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_limit",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "LIMIT", "2", "3"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_limit_desc",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "DESC", "LIMIT", "0", "3"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_limit_beyond_end",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "LIMIT", "6", "100"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_limit_offset_past_end",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "LIMIT", "100", "5"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "array", "value": [] }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_alpha_list",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["RPUSH", "words", "banana", "apple", "cherry", "date"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 4 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_alpha_asc",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "words", "ALPHA"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "apple" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "banana" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "cherry" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "date" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_alpha_desc",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "words", "ALPHA", "DESC"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "date" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "cherry" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "banana" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "apple" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_alpha_limit",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "words", "ALPHA", "LIMIT", "1", "2"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "banana" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "cherry" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_non_numeric_without_alpha_error",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "words"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "error", "value": "ERR One or more scores can't be converted into double" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_missing_key",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nonexistent"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "array", "value": [] }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_string_for_wrongtype",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "mystr", "hello"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_wrongtype",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "mystr"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "error", "value": "WRONGTYPE Operation against a key holding the wrong kind of value" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_store",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "STORE", "sorted_nums"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 8 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "verify_sort_store_result",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["LRANGE", "sorted_nums", "0", "-1"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_store_desc_limit",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nums", "DESC", "LIMIT", "0", "3", "STORE", "top3"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 3 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "verify_sort_store_desc_limit",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["LRANGE", "top3", "0", "-1"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "9" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "6" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_store_missing_key_deletes_dest",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "nonexistent", "STORE", "dest_gone"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 0 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "verify_dest_gone",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["EXISTS", "dest_gone"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 0 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_set_for_sort",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SADD", "myset", "5", "3", "1", "4", "2"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 5 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_set_numeric",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "myset"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "1" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "2" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "3" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "4" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "5" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_zset_for_sort",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["ZADD", "myzset", "10", "c", "20", "a", "30", "b"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 3 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_zset_alpha",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "myzset", "ALPHA"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "a" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "b" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "c" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_by_weights",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["RPUSH", "items", "a", "b", "c"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 3 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_weight_a",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "weight_a", "30"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_weight_b",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "weight_b", "10"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_weight_c",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "weight_c", "20"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_by_external_key",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "weight_*"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "b" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "c" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "a" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_by_external_key_desc",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "weight_*", "DESC"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "a" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "c" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "b" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_by_nosort",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "nosort"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "a" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "b" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "c" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_get_names",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "name_a", "Alice"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_get_names_b",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "name_b", "Bob"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "setup_get_names_c",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SET", "name_c", "Charlie"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_by_get_external",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "weight_*", "GET", "name_*"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "Bob" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "Charlie" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "Alice" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_get_hash_ref",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["HSET", "user:a", "age", "25", "city", "NYC"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 2 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_get_hash_ref_b",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["HSET", "user:b", "age", "30", "city", "LA"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 2 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_get_hash_ref_c",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["HSET", "user:c", "age", "22", "city", "SF"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 2 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_by_hash_get_hash",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "user:*->age", "GET", "user:*->city"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "SF" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "NYC" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "LA" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_get_pound_sign",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": ["SORT", "items", "BY", "weight_*", "GET", "#"],
+      "expect": {
